Mohamed El-Shenawy.bio: Veteran goalkeeper and Al-Ahly legend with 100 caps for Egypt. He was outstanding at the 2018 World Cup and has been the backbone of Egyptian goalkeeping for nearly a decade.
Mohamed El-Shenawy.playingStyle: Commanding, experienced goalkeeper with excellent reflexes, strong shot-stopping, and leadership of the defensive line
Mohamed El-Shenawy.worldCup2026Role: Starting goalkeeper and veteran leader who organizes Egypt's defense from the back
Mohamed El-Shenawy.notableFact: Reached 100 caps for Egypt, making him one of the most capped goalkeepers in the nation's history

Ahmed Fatouh.bio: Left-back who plays for Al-Ahly, Egypt's most successful club. He has been a consistent performer in both domestic and continental competitions.
Ahmed Fatouh.playingStyle: Disciplined left-back who prioritizes defensive solidity while offering occasional overlapping runs
Ahmed Fatouh.worldCup2026Role: Starting or backup left-back providing reliable defensive cover on the left flank
Ahmed Fatouh.notableFact: Has won multiple CAF Champions League titles with Al-Ahly, Africa's most successful club in continental competition

Ahmed Hegazi.bio: Experienced center-back who played in the English Premier League for West Bromwich Albion. Now in the Saudi Pro League with Al-Ittihad, he brings top-level experience and leadership to Egypt's defense.
Ahmed Hegazi.playingStyle: Dominant, physical center-back who excels in aerial duels and brings an authoritative presence to the backline
Ahmed Hegazi.worldCup2026Role: First-choice center-back and defensive leader whose experience at the highest level anchors Egypt's backline
Ahmed Hegazi.notableFact: Impressed in the Premier League with West Brom, becoming one of the few Egyptian outfield players to succeed in English football

Omar Gaber.bio: Versatile right-back with 45 caps who has played in multiple leagues, including a stint in MLS with LAFC. He was part of Egypt's 2018 World Cup squad in Russia.
Omar Gaber.playingStyle: Attack-minded right-back with good pace and the ability to get forward and deliver crosses
Omar Gaber.worldCup2026Role: Experienced right-back option who provides squad depth and international tournament experience
Omar Gaber.notableFact: Has played professional football on three continents, including Europe, North America, and Africa

Ali Gabr.bio: Veteran center-back who plays for Pyramids FC in the Egyptian Premier League. With 35 caps, he has been a trusted figure in Egypt's defensive rotation for many years.
Ali Gabr.playingStyle: Traditional, rugged center-back who relies on physicality, aerial strength, and positional discipline
Ali Gabr.worldCup2026Role: Experienced backup center-back providing depth and know-how in the defensive ranks
Ali Gabr.notableFact: Was part of multiple AFCON campaigns with Egypt, contributing to the team's strong defensive record

Tarek Hamed.bio: Veteran defensive midfielder and Zamalek legend with 60 caps. Known as one of the toughest tacklers in Egyptian football, he is a warrior in the middle of the park.
Tarek Hamed.playingStyle: Fierce, combative defensive midfielder who breaks up play with relentless tackling and tireless running
Tarek Hamed.worldCup2026Role: Experienced midfield anchor who provides defensive protection and tenacity in the engine room
Tarek Hamed.notableFact: A Zamalek icon who has won numerous domestic titles and is revered for his warrior-like commitment on the pitch

Trezeguet.bio: Experienced right winger known by his single name, inspired by the French striker David Trezeguet. He played in the Premier League for Aston Villa and now plays in Turkey for Trabzonspor.
Trezeguet.playingStyle: Pacy, direct winger who cuts inside from the right to shoot with his stronger left foot, creating havoc in defenses
Trezeguet.worldCup2026Role: Key attacking winger who provides a goal threat from wide areas and can change games with his directness
Trezeguet.notableFact: Scored the decisive goal that saved Aston Villa from Premier League relegation, becoming a cult hero at Villa Park

Emam Ashour.bio: Rising midfield talent who plays for Al-Ahly and has quickly become one of the most important players in the Egyptian Premier League. At 28, he is entering his prime years.
Emam Ashour.playingStyle: Dynamic, box-to-box midfielder who combines physical power with technical quality and an ability to drive forward
Emam Ashour.worldCup2026Role: Key midfield starter whose energy and two-way play are central to Egypt's engine room
Emam Ashour.notableFact: Has emerged as one of the best midfielders in African club football through his performances for Al-Ahly

Mohamed Sherif.bio: Striker who moved to the Saudi Pro League after a prolific spell at Al-Ahly. With 8 goals in 25 caps, he has proven himself a reliable goalscorer at international level.
Mohamed Sherif.playingStyle: Sharp, instinctive striker with quick movement in the box and a clinical finishing touch
Mohamed Sherif.worldCup2026Role: Backup striker providing an important goal-scoring option behind the first-choice attack
Mohamed Sherif.notableFact: Was the Egyptian Premier League's top scorer before earning his move to the Saudi Pro League

Mohamed Salah.bio: Global football superstar and Egypt's greatest ever player. The Liverpool icon has won the Premier League, Champions League, and multiple Golden Boots. With 55 goals in 100 caps, he is Egypt's all-time top scorer.
Mohamed Salah.playingStyle: World-class forward who combines blistering pace, incredible dribbling, and lethal left-footed finishing to devastate defenses
Mohamed Salah.worldCup2026Role: Undisputed star player and captain, the entire Egyptian attack is built around maximizing Salah's world-class ability
Mohamed Salah.notableFact: Has scored over 200 goals for Liverpool, won the Champions League, and is widely considered the greatest African footballer of his generation

Mostafa Mohamed.bio: Powerful striker who plays for Nantes in Ligue 1. He has established himself in European football and brings physicality and aerial threat to Egypt's forward line.
Mostafa Mohamed.playingStyle: Strong, physical center-forward who holds the ball up well, wins aerial duels, and finishes chances in the box
Mostafa Mohamed.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-forward who provides the physical focal point for Egypt's attack alongside Salah
Mostafa Mohamed.notableFact: Moved to Ligue 1 from Galatasaray, establishing himself as one of the best African strikers playing in European football

Mohamed Awad.bio: Veteran backup goalkeeper who plays for Zamalek. He has served as a reliable understudy to El-Shenawy for many years in the Egyptian national team setup.
Mohamed Awad.playingStyle: Experienced, steady goalkeeper with solid handling and good command of his penalty area
Mohamed Awad.worldCup2026Role: Backup goalkeeper providing experienced depth behind Mohamed El-Shenawy
Mohamed Awad.notableFact: Has been a loyal servant in the national team setup, always maintaining his readiness despite limited playing time

Akram Tawfik.bio: Dynamic right-back who plays for Al-Ahly and has become a regular in Egypt's defensive setup. He offers pace and energy going forward.
Akram Tawfik.playingStyle: Energetic, attack-minded right-back who gets forward frequently to deliver crosses and provide width
Akram Tawfik.worldCup2026Role: Starting right-back whose attacking contributions add width and dynamism to Egypt's play
Akram Tawfik.notableFact: Has won multiple CAF Champions League titles with Al-Ahly, gaining experience in high-stakes matches across Africa

Mohamed Hany.bio: Experienced right-back from Al-Ahly with 25 caps. A dependable defender who has been a consistent performer in Egyptian domestic football for many years.
Mohamed Hany.playingStyle: Reliable, defensively solid right-back who focuses on his primary defensive duties
Mohamed Hany.worldCup2026Role: Backup right-back providing experienced squad depth in the defensive positions
Mohamed Hany.notableFact: Has been a key part of Al-Ahly's domestic and continental dominance in recent years

Mahmoud Hamdy.bio: Center-back known by his nickname 'El-Wensh' who plays for Zamalek. He has developed into one of the best young defenders in the Egyptian league with his athleticism and reading of the game.
Mahmoud Hamdy.playingStyle: Athletic, aggressive center-back who uses his pace and power to win duels and cover ground quickly
Mahmoud Hamdy.worldCup2026Role: Key center-back option who offers pace and athleticism in Egypt's defensive rotation
Mahmoud Hamdy.notableFact: Known universally as 'El-Wensh', his nickname has become more recognized than his actual name in Egyptian football

Afsha.bio: Creative attacking midfielder known by his single name who is one of Al-Ahly's most important players. With 25 caps and 4 goals, he is a key creative force for Egypt.
Afsha.playingStyle: Skillful, creative playmaker with excellent dribbling, vision, and the ability to score important goals
Afsha.worldCup2026Role: Attacking midfield option who can unlock defenses with his creativity and flair
Afsha.notableFact: Has scored crucial goals for Al-Ahly in the CAF Champions League, earning a reputation as a big-game performer

Mohamed Elneny.bio: Veteran midfielder who spent many years at Arsenal in the Premier League. With 95 caps, he is one of Egypt's most experienced players and brings elite European know-how.
Mohamed Elneny.playingStyle: Tidy, composed central midfielder who keeps the ball moving with simple, effective passing and provides defensive cover
Mohamed Elneny.worldCup2026Role: Experienced midfield option who brings Arsenal-level composure and game management
Mohamed Elneny.notableFact: Spent over seven years at Arsenal, becoming a popular figure at the club and one of the few Egyptian players to succeed in the Premier League

Ahmed Sayed.bio: Exciting right winger known by his nickname 'Zizo' who plays for Zamalek. With 30 caps and 5 goals, he is one of the most dynamic attackers in Egyptian football.
Ahmed Sayed.playingStyle: Quick, tricky winger with excellent dribbling and the ability to create chances out of nothing with his skill
Ahmed Sayed.worldCup2026Role: Attacking wing option who can provide a creative spark and unpredictability in the final third
Ahmed Sayed.notableFact: Known as 'Zizo', he is one of the most popular players in Egyptian football and a Zamalek fan favorite

Omar Fayed.bio: Young defensive midfielder from Zamalek who has quickly risen through the ranks to earn international recognition. At just 23, he represents the future of Egypt's midfield.
Omar Fayed.playingStyle: Young, energetic defensive midfielder who presses aggressively and covers large amounts of ground
Omar Fayed.worldCup2026Role: Young midfield option who can provide energy and fresh legs in the defensive midfield role
Omar Fayed.notableFact: One of the youngest players in the squad, he has quickly established himself as a key player for Zamalek

Omar Marmoush.bio: Electrifying forward who plays for Manchester City in the Premier League after a sensational spell at Eintracht Frankfurt. He has emerged as one of the most exciting players in world football alongside Mohamed Salah.
Omar Marmoush.playingStyle: Explosive, versatile forward who combines blistering pace, clever movement, and clinical finishing from the left wing or as a striker
Omar Marmoush.worldCup2026Role: Key attacking star alongside Salah, forming one of the most dangerous attacking duos at the World Cup
Omar Marmoush.notableFact: His sensational form at Eintracht Frankfurt earned a big-money move to Manchester City, making him one of the most expensive African players ever

Ayman Ashraf.bio: Veteran right-back from Al-Ahly with 25 caps. A dependable defensive player who has been part of numerous domestic and continental triumphs with Egypt's biggest club.
Ayman Ashraf.playingStyle: Tough, defensively focused right-back who prioritizes stopping opponents and maintaining the team's shape
Ayman Ashraf.worldCup2026Role: Experienced defensive squad player providing depth at right-back
Ayman Ashraf.notableFact: Has won numerous titles with Al-Ahly including multiple CAF Champions League trophies

Ahmed Sobhi.bio: Third-choice goalkeeper from Al-Ahly who provides additional depth in the goalkeeping department for the national team.
Ahmed Sobhi.playingStyle: Solid, reliable goalkeeper who trains daily with top-level teammates and is always ready when called upon
Ahmed Sobhi.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper providing goalkeeping depth in the World Cup squad
Ahmed Sobhi.notableFact: Training daily alongside Africa's best players at Al-Ahly keeps his standards exceptionally high

Ramadan Sobhi.bio: Talented left winger who played for Stoke City and Huddersfield in England before returning to Egypt. Once considered one of the brightest young talents in African football.
Ramadan Sobhi.playingStyle: Skillful, creative left winger with excellent close control, dribbling ability, and an eye for the spectacular
Ramadan Sobhi.worldCup2026Role: Attacking option on the left wing who can create magic moments with his individual skill
Ramadan Sobhi.notableFact: Made his Premier League debut as a teenager with Stoke City and was tipped as one of the most talented young Egyptians of his generation

Ahmed Kouka.bio: Experienced striker with 30 caps and 12 goals who plays in the Portuguese top flight for Vitoria SC. He has been a consistent goal threat for Egypt across multiple campaigns.
Ahmed Kouka.playingStyle: Clinical, predatory striker who positions himself well in the box and finishes chances with composure
Ahmed Kouka.worldCup2026Role: Experienced backup striker who can provide goals off the bench in crucial moments
Ahmed Kouka.notableFact: With 12 goals in 30 caps, he has one of the best goals-per-game ratios among Egyptian strikers in recent history

Karim Hafez.bio: Left-back who plays in the Egyptian Premier League for Ittihad El Shorta. He has been part of the national team setup as a backup option at left-back.
Karim Hafez.playingStyle: Left-footed defender who provides a natural option on the left side with decent delivery and defensive awareness
Karim Hafez.worldCup2026Role: Backup left-back providing squad depth on the left side of defense
Karim Hafez.notableFact: Has been part of multiple Egypt squads across various competitions, providing dependable depth

Ibrahim Adel.bio: Young and exciting right winger from Al-Ahly who is considered one of the most promising talents in Egyptian football. At 25, he is entering his prime and has 15 caps with 2 goals.
Ibrahim Adel.playingStyle: Quick, direct young winger with pace, skill, and the confidence to take on defenders in one-on-one situations
Ibrahim Adel.worldCup2026Role: Exciting young attacking option who can provide pace and energy off the bench or in rotation
Ibrahim Adel.notableFact: One of Al-Ahly's brightest academy graduates, he has already shown his quality in the CAF Champions League at a young age
